commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Moreover the Nethinim dwelling in Ophel, repaired unto the place opposite the water gate toward the east, and the tower that projects out. A very strong tower. See 2 Paralipomenon xxvii. , and xxxiii. East of the great court of the temple, from which it was not remote, as Esdras here harangued the people, chap. , and 3 Esdras viii. Out of the gate was a pond of water, (Calmet) for the service of the temple. (Menochius).
